inline_comments.message:
change to one of the following suggestions:
1. change all function names to get... instead of update... , make each function return a stream and add it to the map in the static block. this way you'll have a total separation between the global map and the each stream purpose and you can use the get functions independently later(by only make them public)/
2. change the function names from update... to add...

I like the first option best but if you don't see any later business need for it, then go for the second option
